titles.text: Matsumura Kunihiro-den: Saikyou no Rekishi wo Nurikaero!
松村邦洋伝 最強の歴史をぬりかえろ！

descriptions.text: Kunihiro Matsumura, famous for his impersonations, battles as the "karateka" to face off against seven different opponents. With original style and gameplay, the game uses a parody of fighting moves along with various gag moves such as the Piro Piro and Bow Bow evasion technique.
